description:
Returns a list of all Correspondence Type Items in the specified Project. 
For more information on Generic Tool and Correspondence Tool endpoints, 
see [Working with the Correspondence Tool](/documentation/tutorial-correspondence).

parameters.name: project_id
parameters.description: Unique identifier for the project.

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: Page

parameters.name: per_page
parameters.description: Elements per page

parameters.name: filters[id]
parameters.description: Return item(s) with the specified IDs.

parameters.name: filters[login_information_id]
parameters.description: Array of Login Information IDs. Returns item(s) with the specified Login Information ID.

parameters.name: filters[status]
parameters.description: Returns item(s) matching the specified status value.

parameters.name: filters[overdue]
parameters.description: If true, returns item(s) that are overdue.

parameters.name: filters[query]
parameters.description: Return item(s) containing search query

parameters.name: filters[recycle_bin]
parameters.description: If true, returns item(s) that have been deleted.

parameters.name: filters[generic_tool_id]
parameters.description: Return item(s) within the specified Generic Tool ID(s)

parameters.name: filters[received_from_id]
parameters.description: Received From ID

parameters.name: filters[created_by_id]
parameters.description: Returns item(s) created by the specified User IDs.

parameters.name: filters[created_at]
parameters.description:
Return item(s) created within the specified ISO 8601 datetime range.
Formats:
`YYYY-MM-DD`...`YYYY-MM-DD` - Date
`YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SSZ`...`YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SSZ` - DateTime with UTC Offset
`YYYY-MM-...

parameters.name: filters[updated_at]
parameters.description:
Return item(s) last updated within the specified ISO 8601 datetime range.
Formats:
`YYYY-MM-DD`...`YYYY-MM-DD` - Date
`YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SSZ`...`YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SSZ` - DateTime with UTC Offset
`YYY...

parameters.name: filters[closed_at]
parameters.description: Returns item(s) closed within the specified ISO 8601 datetime range.

parameters.name: filters[issued_at]
parameters.description: Returns item(s) issued within the specified ISO 8601 datetime range.

parameters.name: filters[vendor_id]
parameters.description: Return item(s) with the specified Vendor ID.

parameters.name: filters[private]
parameters.description: If true, returns only item(s) with a `private` status.

parameters.name: filters[location_id]
parameters.description: Filters by specific location (Note: Use *either* this or location_id_with_sublocations, but not both)

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: Field to sort by. If the field is passed with a - (EX: -updated_at) it is sorted in reverse order

parameters.name: group
parameters.description: Controls if the Items are returned sorted by the sort attribute then the Generic Tool's Title or just the sort attribute. Defaults to 'generic_tool_title'.

parameters.name: view
parameters.description: Defines the type of view returned. Must be one of 'extended', 'compact', 'ids_only', or 'flatten_v0'.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Generic Tool Item

description.description: Description of a Generic Tool Item

position.description: The Number of the Generic Tool Item

private.description: If the Generic Tool Item is private

status.description: Status of the Generic Tool Item

status_type.description: The default status the Generic Tool Item's status is mapped to.

title.description: Title of the Generic Tool Item

updated_at.description: Timestamp of last update to Location

code.description: The unique code for this Location

full_code.description: Full Cost code, including parent prefixes

updated_at.description: Timestamp of last update to Trade

id.description: Unique identifier for the generic tool.

abbreviation.description: Abbreviation for the Title. Will be used as a prefix for the Generic Tool Item number.

domain_id.description: Unique identifier for the generic tool domain.

title.description: Primary name/title for the generic tool.
